title: acourtia huajuapana var. huajuapana
intro: Acourtia huajuapana var. huajuapana, also known as Huajuapan daisy or Mexican daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Acourtia huajuapana var. huajuapana include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, and its leaves and flowers are often dried and used in traditional remedies.
